plugins.name: AttractorFlow
plugins.description: Monitor and steer multi-agent Claude Code trajectories using dynamical systems theory. Computes finite-time Lyapunov exponents (FTLE) over semantic embedding sequences to classify agent trajectory regimes (CONVERGING / CYCLING / EXPLORING / DIVERGING / STUCK / OSCILLATING / PLATEAU) and prescribe interventions before tasks derail.

setup.notes: Install uv (one-time, ~5 MB). Restart Claude Code. Python dependencies and the sentence-transformers model load automatically on first use — no venv, pip, or claude mcp add needed.

features.name: Regime Classification
features.description: Real-time classification of agent trajectory state using Lyapunov exponents

features.name: Orchestration
features.description: Three specialist agents: attractor-orchestrator (meta-router), explorer-agent (basin exploration), convergence-agent (fixed-point tuning)

features.name: 8 MCP Tools
features.description: record_state, get_regime, get_lyapunov, get_trajectory, get_basin_depth, detect_bifurcation, inject_perturbation, checkpoint
